# zenanalyze public API surface
# Generated by tests/public_api_doc.rs via `cargo public-api --simplified`
# (regenerated on every `cargo test`; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).
# Underscore-prefixed features are internal and excluded from the
# all-features section.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes together with the code.
# POLICY: zenanalyze's public API is tightly governed (see CLAUDE.md) —
# additions only within a 0.x line; breaks need a minor bump + changelog.

## default features (260 items)

pub zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature::Uniformity = 5
pub zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature::Variance = 0
pub zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature::VarianceSpread = 9
pub zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature::WideGamutFraction = 37
pub zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature::WideGamutPeak = 36
pub zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature::Xyb444ColorLoss = 138
pub zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature::XybBquarterChromaLoss = 139
impl zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature
pub const fn zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature::from_u16(u16) -> core::option::Option<Self>
pub const fn zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature::id(self) -> u16
pub const fn zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature::name(self) -> &'static str
impl core::clone::Clone for zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature
pub fn zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature::clone(&self) -> zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature

impl core::cmp::PartialEq for zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature
pub fn zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature::eq(&self, &zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature) -> bool
impl core::fmt::Debug for zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature
pub fn zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::hash::Hash for zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature
pub fn zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature::hash<__H: core::hash::Hasher>(&self, &mut __H)
impl core::marker::Copy for zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature
impl core::marker::StructuralPartialEq for zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature
impl core::marker::Freeze for zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature
impl core::marker::Send for zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature
impl core::marker::Sync for zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisFeature

#[non_exhaustive] pub enum zenanalyze::AnalyzeError
pub zenanalyze::AnalyzeError::Convert(alloc::string::String)
pub zenanalyze::AnalyzeError::Internal(alloc::string::String)
pub zenanalyze::AnalyzeError::InvalidInput(alloc::string::String)
pub zenanalyze::AnalyzeError::OutOfMemory
pub zenanalyze::AnalyzeError::OutOfMemory::bytes_requested: core::option::Option<usize>
impl core::error::Error for zenanalyze::AnalyzeError
impl core::fmt::Debug for zenanalyze::AnalyzeError
pub fn zenanalyze::AnalyzeError::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::fmt::Display for zenanalyze::AnalyzeError
pub fn zenanalyze::AnalyzeError::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::marker::Freeze for zenanalyze::AnalyzeError
impl core::marker::Send for zenanalyze::AnalyzeError
impl core::marker::Sync for zenanalyze::AnalyzeError
impl core::marker::Unpin for zenanalyze::AnalyzeError
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenanalyze::AnalyzeError
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenanalyze::AnalyzeError
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenanalyze::AnalyzeError
pub fn zenanalyze::analyze_features(zenpixels::buffer::PixelSlice<'_>, &zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisQuery) -> core::result::Result<zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisResults, zenanalyze::AnalyzeError>
pub fn zenanalyze::analyze_features_rgb8(&[u8], u32, u32, &zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisQuery) -> zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisResults
pub fn zenanalyze::try_analyze_features_rgb8(&[u8], u32, u32, &zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisQuery) -> core::result::Result<zenanalyze::feature::AnalysisResults, zenanalyze::AnalyzeError>
